headline: Labor Dept. Rules Clear the Way for 401(k)s to Add Private Assets
summary: Private asset managers such as Blackstone, Apollo Global Management, and KKR have long lobbied for access to the $14 trillion in 401(k) programs.

raw.headline: Labor Dept. Rules Clear the Way for 401(k)s to Add Private Assets
raw.summary: Private asset managers such as Blackstone, Apollo Global Management, and KKR have long lobbied for access to the $14 trillion in 401(k) programs.

headline: 401(k) alternative asset rule proposed by Labor Department
summary: The Department of Labor has proposed a rule to let 401(k) plans more easily include alternative assets such as private equity, cryptocurrencies and real estate.

raw.headline: 401(k) alternative asset rule proposed by Labor Department
raw.summary: The Department of Labor has proposed a rule to let 401(k) plans more easily include alternative assets such as private equity, cryptocurrencies and real estate.
